# music.vaked.dev (ENTHEA)

> Real-time psychedelic visual synthesizer. WebGL2 + Web Audio. Zero dependencies. No build. No tracking.

29 mathematically-computed visionary modes: neural fields, reaction-diffusion, quasicrystals, Kleinian groups, elliptic functions, and more. Driven by live audio. Vaked Tier 2 telemetry feeds the ultrawhale-dogfood dataset.

## What it is

- Single HTML file, runs in any modern browser
- 29 modes based on neuroscience (Bressloff-Cowan V1 model, Klüver form constants, Turing bifurcations)
- 14 entheogen visual signatures (LSD, psilocybin, DMT, mescaline, ayahuasca, 2C-B, ketamine, etc.)
- Predictive drop detection, MIDI-learn, scene snapshots, breath pacer
- Source: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/ENTHEA (AGPL-3.0)

## Vaked ecosystem

- [protocol.vaked.dev](https://protocol.vaked.dev): AG-UI protocol spec + genesis
- [chat.vaked.dev](https://chat.vaked.dev): G0DM0D3 free-model AI chat
- [beat.vaked.dev](https://beat.vaked.dev): Vaked-FM swarm avatar
- [irc.vaked.dev](https://irc.vaked.dev): public IRC community
- [pocoo.vaked.dev](https://pocoo.vaked.dev): technical blog
- [pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml](https://pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml): Atom feed

## Dataset

- [PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood](https://huggingface.co/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood): telemetry from this site feeds this dataset

## Author

- GitHub: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec
- X: https://x.com/0xp3t3rl
